parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "query": "={{ $json.body.course_topic + ' university course curriculum syllabus learning objectives' }}",
  "search_depth": "advanced",
  "max_results": 5,
  "include_answer": true,
  "include_raw_content": false,
  "include_domains": ["coursera.org", "mit.edu", "stanford.edu", "khanacademy.org"]
}
